title: 3DMaces
description: A smaller version of my main resource pack. only for maces
body:
This is the full resource pack...
I mean... if you're here I'd expect you to only want the maces, so dont expect much.

Hammer mace follows the same rules: must be named either Judge, Crucible, Big Boi, or ነፕቿረረልቿ ቻዪልርፕጎዐ
